info.name: Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Lentur
info.description: API collection for Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Lentur (Flexible Pavement Scope) module - Master data for scope of work in flexible/asphalt pavement construction

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Ruang Lingkup Lentur (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan lentur with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "jenis": "Lapis Permukaan (AC-WC)",
      "createdAt": "...",
      "updatedAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "amount": 10,
  "total": 8,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Ruang Lingkup Lentur (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan lentur without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Get single jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan lentur detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "jenis": "Lapis Permukaan (AC-WC)",
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan lentur.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "jenis": "string" // Required - Jenis ruang lingkup
}
```

**Common Values** (Flexible Pavement Layers):

**Surface Layers (Lapis Permukaan)**:
- "Lapis Permukaan (AC-WC)" - Asphalt Concrete Wearing Course
- "Lapis Permukaan (AC-BC)" - Asphalt Concrete Binder Course
- "Lapis Permukaan (HRS-WC)" - Hot Rolled Sheet Wearing Course
- "Lapis Permukaan (HRS-Base)" - Hot Rolled Sheet Base

**Base Layers (Lapis Pondasi)**:
- "Lapis Pondasi Atas (AC-Base)" - AC Base Course
- "Lapis Pondasi Atas (Agregat Kelas A)" - Class A Aggregate
- "Lapis Pondasi Bawah (Agregat Kelas B)" - Class B Aggregate
- "Lapis Pondasi Bawah (Agregat Kelas C)" - Class C Aggregate

**Others**:
- "Lapis Resap Pengikat (Prime Coat)"
- "Lapis Perekat (Tack Coat)"
- "Bahu Jalan" - Road Shoulder
- "Saluran Drainase" - Drainage Channel

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Lentur created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "Lapis Permukaan (AC-WC)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create AC Binder Course layer.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create AC Base Course layer.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create Class A Aggregate base layer.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create Prime Coat layer.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan lentur.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,      // Required - ID to update
  "jenis": string    // Optional - New jenis name
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Lentur updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "Lapis Permukaan (AC-WC) Updated",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Soft delete jalan ruang lingkup perkerasan lentur.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Ruang Lingkup Perkerasan Lentur deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Note**: This is a soft delete. The record will be marked as deleted but not removed from database.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
